message:
Add storage abstraction module for configurable persistence

Implement unified storage interface with multiple backends:
- memory: In-memory only (default, most secure)
- session: sessionStorage (cleared on tab close)
- local: localStorage (persistent across sessions)
- opfs: Origin Private File System (largest capacity)

Features:
- User must explicitly opt-in to persistent storage
- Clear functions for all storage types
- Prefixed keys to avoid collisions
- Cached OPFS directory handle

Security model prioritizes data protection with memory-only default.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
